progress_summary: v1.4 PRs 1-3 all shipped (serial leg complete): #192 → 4cb0b09 (ADEV-328 pack registry architecture), #203 → 22c45cd (ADEV-329 backfill 5 language packs), #207 → 29218da (ADEV-330 pack-aware dispatch + api-dev adapters + kind:mobile branch). Production still on 526a9a2 (v1.4 release ships in PR 8). PRs 4-7 now parallelize. THIS SESSION started v1.4 PR 4 (ADEV-334 modern web bulk) on branch claude/implement-v1.4-features-frpwm: 3 new language packs (elixir, bun, deno) + 4 new framework packs (phoenix on elixir; remix/sveltekit/solid on typescript). User-approved kind taxonomy for bun/deno: language packs (distinct toolchains — bun test / deno test diverge from vitest). typescript pack.yml updated with frameworks: [remix, sveltekit, solid] to satisfy the bidirectional invariant; elixir pack ships with frameworks: [phoenix]. gen-stack-packs: 5/5 → 12 pack(s), 12 coverage flag(s). gen-api-dev-adapters: 5 → 8 language pack(s). Flag registry grew from 97 → 104. Tests extended: stack-packs-real (language + new framework-pack equivalence + bidirectional invariant), api-dev-adapters (8 language adapters + explicit skip-frameworks assertion), pack-dispatch (all 8 languages + framework parsing). Vitest 198/198 green, prebuild + astro build clean. Ready to commit + push + open PR. No blockers.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.

user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: Commit + push PR 4 from claude/implement-v1.4-features-frpwm and open the PR linked to ADEV-334. Diff: 7 new pack directories (3 language + 4 framework), updated typescript pack.yml, extended pack-dispatch / api-dev-adapter / stack-packs-real tests. Vitest 198/198 green; prebuild + astro build clean.

After PR 4 merges, parallelize PRs 5/6/6.5/7. PR 5 (ADEV-335) enterprise bulk needs NEW language packs first (java/csharp/kotlin/php) before the framework packs (spring-java/dotnet-aspnet/spring-kotlin/laravel-php). PR 6 (ADEV-336) Apple/iOS first dogfoods the dispatchMobile() envelope shipped in PR 3 (swift language + swiftui framework + ios-swiftui mobile pack + app-store adapter). PR 6.5 (ADEV-343) brings kotlin-android, flutter, react-native-expo, play-store. PR 7 (ADEV-337) hosting adapters: railway/netlify/heroku/aws-amplify deploy-target packs — no coverage flag emitted for kind=deploy-target.

PR 8 (ADEV-331) is the v1.4 release: /coverage page, v1.4 pill on homepage, version bump on the 5 changed skills (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops), CHANGELOG entry, prod deploy via wrangler from laptop.
